message:
feat(connector-testbed): add integration testbed with mock providers, sandbox probes, and chaos scenarios

Implements ft-3681t.5.13 — connector integration testbed with:
- MockProvider: deterministic failure simulation with bounded request logs
- SandboxEscapeAttempt: filesystem/network/exec escape evaluators
- ChaosScenario: provider outage, error storm, sandbox probe, ingestion flood
- ConnectorTestbed: orchestrates providers, governor, sandbox, and ingestion pipeline
- 32 unit tests covering all paths (mock provider, sandbox, chaos, serde, telemetry)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
